scenes.name: Line Chart
scenes.description: Animated line graph with points appearing and line drawing between them. Shows a single metric changing over time.

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Chart heading displayed above the graph.

fields.label: Data Points
fields.description: Y-axis values — one number per point on the line.

fields.label: X-Axis Labels
fields.description: Labels along the bottom axis (one per data point).

fields.label: Y-Axis Label
fields.description: Label text for the vertical axis.

fields.label: Line Color
fields.description: CSS color for the chart line. Default: purple.

scenes.name: Area Chart
scenes.description: Gradient-filled area chart with smooth curves. Multiple series can overlap to show cumulative volume.

fields.label: Data Series
fields.description: Array of data series to plot.

scenes.name: Animated Bar Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal animated progress bars with spring physics and count-up numbers.

scenes.name: Donut Ring Chart
scenes.description: Multi-segment ring chart that fills progressively. Center shows text. Legend items stagger in.

fields.label: Center Label
fields.description: Text shown in the center of the donut ring (e.g. total).

scenes.name: Pie Chart
scenes.description: Classic animated pie with slices drawing in sequentially. Labels outside with connector lines.

scenes.name: Bar Race
scenes.description: Animated bar chart where bars reorder as values change over time. Shows competitions/rankings evolving.

fields.label: Rounds
fields.description: Time rounds. Each has a label and values per competitor.

itemSchema.label: Values
itemSchema.description: Map of competitor name → value. e.g. {"YouTube": 100, "TikTok": 80}.

fields.label: Bar Colors
fields.description: Map of competitor name → color. e.g. {"YouTube": "#FF0000"}.

scenes.name: Radial Bar Chart
scenes.description: Bars extend outward from a central circle like a sunburst. Multi-category comparison.

scenes.name: Gauge Dial
scenes.description: Speedometer-style gauge with animated needle, colored zones, and count-up value.

fields.label: Current Value
fields.description: The value the needle points to.

fields.label: Color Zones
fields.description: Colored zones on the gauge arc.

scenes.name: Heatmap
scenes.description: Color-intensity grid where cells represent values. Rows and columns with labels.

fields.label: Data Grid
fields.description: 2D array of values (row × column). Higher values = brighter cells.

scenes.name: Bubble Chart
scenes.description: Positioned circles with labels. Size encodes value. Shows multi-variable relationships.

scenes.name: Bullet Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal bars showing actual vs target with a max range.

scenes.name: Dumbbell Chart
scenes.description: Before/after comparison. Each row shows a line connecting two dot values.

scenes.name: Gantt Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal timeline bars showing task durations and overlaps.

fields.label: Time Labels
fields.description: Labels for each time unit on X-axis.

fields.label: Total Units
fields.description: Total number of time units (X-axis range).

scenes.name: Lollipop Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal lines with dots at the end — cleaner alternative to bar charts.

scenes.name: Polar Area Chart
scenes.description: Circular chart where segments extend from center with varying radii.

scenes.name: Scatter Plot
scenes.description: XY scatter plot with categorized points and legends.

itemSchema.label: Category
itemSchema.description: Category name (must match a categories entry).

scenes.name: Sparkline Grid
scenes.description: Dashboard-style grid of metric cards each with a tiny inline sparkline chart.

itemSchema.label: Sparkline Data
itemSchema.description: Array of numbers for the sparkline.

scenes.name: Stacked Area Chart
scenes.description: Multiple area series stacked on top of each other.

scenes.name: Stacked Bar Chart
scenes.description: Vertical bars with multiple colored segments stacked in each bar.

scenes.name: Stock Ticker
scenes.description: Scrolling stock ticker strip with green/red price changes.

scenes.name: Time Series
scenes.description: Multi-line time series chart with multiple named data lines.

scenes.name: Treemap
scenes.description: Nested rectangles sized by value. Area represents proportion.

scenes.name: Waterfall Chart
scenes.description: Step-by-step incremental/decremental chart showing how a total is reached.

itemSchema.label: Is Total?
itemSchema.description: True = this is a running total bar.

scenes.name: Number Ticker
scenes.description: Big animated count-up numbers with labels — great for KPIs and highlight stats.

scenes.name: Glow Line Chart
scenes.description: Glowing line chart with a big stat number displayed prominently above.

fields.label: Stat Value
fields.description: Big stat number shown above chart.

scenes.name: Notebook Chart
scenes.description: Notebook-style node chart with labeled nodes connected in a flow.

scenes.name: Hero Text
scenes.description: Big hero text with floating 3D screens behind it. Cinematic opener feel.

scenes.name: Glitch Text
scenes.description: Chromatic-aberration glitch effect on two text lines with a subtitle.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.description: Smaller subtitle below the glitch text.

scenes.name: Typewriter Quote
scenes.description: Quote that types in character by character, then shows the author.

fields.label: Quote
fields.description: The quote text that types in.

fields.label: Author
fields.description: Attribution line shown after typing completes.

scenes.name: Word By Word
scenes.description: Words appear one at a time. Highlighted words get a color pulse.

itemSchema.label: Highlight?
itemSchema.description: Whether this word pulses with accent color.

fields.label: Subtitle
fields.description: Subtitle shown below the word sequence.

scenes.name: Gradient Quote
scenes.description: Quote with a specific phrase highlighted in gradient color.

fields.label: Highlight Phrase
fields.description: Substring within the quote to highlight with gradient.

scenes.name: Key Insight
scenes.description: Two-color insight statement — white + purple accent text.

fields.label: Subtext
fields.description: Smaller descriptive text below the insight.

scenes.name: Dual Color Text
scenes.description: Staggered two-color statements appearing one after another.

scenes.name: Fire Text
scenes.description: Big text with animated fire/glow effect and optional concert-stage background.

scenes.name: Section Number
scenes.description: Big section number with header and description — great for chapter markers.

scenes.name: Text Mask Reveal
scenes.description: Two lines revealed through a mask animation with a tagline.

scenes.name: Dark Text Card
scenes.description: Dark card with title, subtitle, and optional bullet points.

scenes.name: Hook
scenes.description: Purple-glow hook opener with white + accent title, subtitle, and tagline.

fields.label: White Title
fields.description: White portion of the hook title.

fields.label: Accent Title
fields.description: Purple/accent portion of the hook title.

scenes.name: Countdown Reveal
scenes.description: Counting down from a number, then reveals text with a glow burst.

fields.label: Reveal Text
fields.description: Text revealed after countdown reaches zero.

scenes.name: Spotlight Reveal
scenes.description: Text appears under a moving spotlight beam.

scenes.name: Cinematic Outro
scenes.description: Cinematic ending with title, subtitle, pillar keywords, and tagline.

fields.label: Pillars
fields.description: Key points shown as pillar words.

scenes.name: Ending
scenes.description: Ending with sequential questions and a two-color CTA.

scenes.name: Grand Finale
scenes.description: Keywords animate in sequence, then final title + tagline + CTA button.

scenes.name: Number Ticker
scenes.description: Animated count-up numbers with labels.

scenes.name: Icon Grid
scenes.description: Grid of feature cards, each with an icon, title, and short description.

scenes.name: Stats Grid
scenes.description: Grid of animated stat cards with count-up numbers and icons.

scenes.name: Two Column
scenes.description: Side-by-side two columns with headers and icon+text list items.

scenes.name: Testimonial
scenes.description: Quote card with author name, role, and star rating.

scenes.name: Progress Steps
scenes.description: Vertical step-by-step progress indicator with active step highlighted.

fields.label: Active Step
fields.description: Index of the currently active step (0-based).

scenes.name: Animated Checklist
scenes.description: Checklist with items checking off one by one with animation.

fields.label: Completed Count
fields.description: How many items appear as completed.

scenes.name: Metric Dashboard
scenes.description: Multi-widget dashboard with numbers, bars, sparklines, and ring charts.

scenes.name: Video Smart Camera
scenes.description: Plays a video with keyframe-driven camera movements (zoom, pan, perspective) and highlight overlays.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video filename in public/ or remote URL (set isStaticFile=false for URLs).

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Start From (sec)
fields.description: Seconds into the video to start playing.

scenes.name: Ken Burns
scenes.description: Cinematic Ken Burns with organic floating feel. Smooth start→end camera interpolation plus Perlin noise micro-drift for a living, breathing feel.

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Image or video filename in public/ or remote URL (set isStaticFile=false for URLs).

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True if the source is a video file.

fields.label: Style Preset
fields.description: One-click preset — sets camera path, speed, noise, and perspective all at once. Pick a look, then fine-tune individual settings below if needed.

options.label: Epic Reveal
options.description: Starts tight, pulls wide with rotation

fields.label: Direction Preset
fields.description: Camera path direction (used when Style Preset is 'Custom'). Set to 'custom' to use manual start/end values.

fields.label: Motion Amount
fields.description: How much organic floating drift to add (0=none, 0.3=subtle, 0.6=moderate, 1=heavy).

fields.label: Drift Pattern
fields.description: Change to get a different organic drift pattern.

fields.label: Motion Speed
fields.description: How fast the organic drift evolves (0.3=very slow dreamy, 0.5=smooth default, 1.0=moderate, 1.5=fast).

fields.label: 3D Depth
fields.description: Perspective depth in px. Lower = more dramatic 3D. 0 = flat/disabled.

fields.label: Zoom Bounce
fields.description: Sine-wave zoom oscillation for zoom-out-then-zoom-in effect (0=off, 0.15=subtle, 0.35=noticeable, 0.5=strong).

fields.label: Bounce Cycles
fields.description: How many full zoom bounce cycles over the clip (1=one slow pulse, 3=energetic, 5=rapid).

fields.label: Mirror Motion
fields.description: Reverse / flip all movement and rotation directions. Zoom stays the same.

fields.label: Reveal Mode
fields.description: When on, the image scales within the frame instead of cropping. Zoom out reveals the full image with background visible at edges. Great for showcasing full artwork/photos.

fields.label: Reveal Background
fields.description: Background color shown behind the image in reveal mode.

scenes.name: Handheld Camera
scenes.description: Floating organic camera motion with optional Ken Burns drift. Makes images/video feel alive with layered Perlin noise. Add directional drift for cinematic movement.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True if the source is a video file.

fields.label: Motion Preset
fields.description: One-click motion style — sets intensity, speed, zoom, perspective, and drift all at once. Fine-tune individual settings below.

options.label: Dreamy
options.description: Very slow and gentle with drift

fields.label: Motion Speed
fields.description: How fast the motion evolves (0.3=very slow dreamy, 0.5=smooth, 0.75=moderate, 1.5=fast).

fields.label: Base Zoom
fields.description: Base zoom level (>1.1 recommended to avoid edge reveal).

fields.label: Position Drift (px)
fields.description: How much the entire image floats left/right/up/down on the canvas (0=off, 25=default, 50=heavy).

fields.label: Zoom Bounce
fields.description: Sine-wave zoom oscillation for zoom-out-then-zoom-in effect (0=off, 0.15=subtle, 0.30=noticeable, 0.5=strong).

fields.label: Bounce Cycles
fields.description: How many full zoom bounce cycles over the clip (1=one slow pulse, 3=energetic, 5=rapid).

fields.label: Motion Pattern
fields.description: Change to get a different random motion pattern.

fields.label: Mirror Motion
fields.description: Reverse / flip all movement and rotation directions. Zoom stays the same.

fields.label: Reveal Mode
fields.description: When on, the image scales within the frame instead of cropping. Zoom out reveals the full image with background visible at edges.

fields.label: Reveal Background
fields.description: Background color shown behind the image in reveal mode.

scenes.name: Aurora
scenes.description: Northern lights / aurora borealis animated background.

fields.label: Overlay Title
fields.description: Optional title text overlaid on the background.

scenes.name: Smart Camera
scenes.description: Keyframe-driven virtual cinematography on a static image. Smooth zoom/pan/perspective movements via interpolated camera keyframes.

fields.label: Image Source
fields.description: Image filename in public/ or remote URL (set isStaticFile=false for URLs).

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Image Width
fields.description: Original image width in pixels (for layout math).

fields.label: Image Height
fields.description: Original image height in pixels (for layout math).

fields.label: Content Type
fields.description: Type of content for camera presets.

fields.label: Camera Keyframes
fields.description: Array of keyframes defining camera movement. The core camera animation data.

itemSchema.label: Hold Frames
itemSchema.description: Frames to hold at this value before transitioning.

scenes.name: Spotlight
scenes.description: Video/image with spotlight focus effect. Dims the frame except for circular/rectangular spotlight areas that track regions sequentially.

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Video or image filename in public/ or remote URL (set isStaticFile=false for URLs).

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True for video, false for image.

fields.label: Spotlights
fields.description: Array of spotlight focus areas. Each spotlight has a position, radius, and timing.

itemSchema.label: Label
itemSchema.description: Optional label text for this spotlight.

scenes.name: Picture in Picture
scenes.description: Main video with a PIP overlay. Speaker facecam in corner while content fills the screen.

fields.label: Main Video Source
fields.description: Primary video filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Main Start From (sec)
fields.description: Start time for main video in seconds.

fields.label: Main End At (sec)
fields.description: End time for main video in seconds.

fields.label: PIP Source
fields.description: PIP video or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: PIP Is Video?
fields.description: True if PIP source is a video.

fields.label: PIP Start From (sec)
fields.description: Start time for PIP video in seconds.

scenes.name: Split Compare
scenes.description: Side-by-side or top/bottom split comparison with two videos or images, optional animated wipe.

nestedSchema.label: Source
nestedSchema.description: Video or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

nestedSchema.label: Is Video?
nestedSchema.description: True for video, false for image.

nestedSchema.label: Label
nestedSchema.description: Text label shown on this side.

nestedSchema.label: Source
nestedSchema.description: Video or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

nestedSchema.label: Is Video?
nestedSchema.description: True for video, false for image.

nestedSchema.label: Label
nestedSchema.description: Text label shown on this side.

scenes.name: Text Callout
scenes.description: Video/image with animated text callout annotations pointing to specific regions. Arrow/line + label pill.

fields.label: Source
fields.description: Video or image filename in public/ or remote URL (set isStaticFile=false for URLs).

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True for video, false for image.

fields.label: Callouts
fields.description: Array of text callout annotations. Each callout has text, position, and target.

scenes.name: Image Highlight / Underline
scenes.description: Pure highlight or underline overlay on an image. Two modes: 'highlight' fills regions with translucent color (marker effect); 'underline' draws a colored line at the bottom of each region and dims non-region areas to focus attention. NO built-in camera — compose with SmartCamera or PerspectiveZoom for camera effects.

fields.label: Image Source
fields.description: Image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Image Width
fields.description: Original image width in px (auto-detected if omitted).

fields.label: Image Height
fields.description: Original image height in px (auto-detected if omitted).

fields.label: Highlight Regions
fields.description: Array of highlight areas. Each region has position (x,y,w,h as % of image 0-100), optional startFrame, color, opacity, animation override.

itemSchema.label: X (%)
itemSchema.description: Left edge as % of image width (0-100).

itemSchema.label: Y (%)
itemSchema.description: Top edge as % of image height (0-100).

itemSchema.label: Start Frame
itemSchema.description: Frame when this highlight appears. If omitted, auto-calculated from order × framesPerRegion.

itemSchema.label: Color Override
itemSchema.description: Override highlight color for this specific region.

itemSchema.label: Animation Override
itemSchema.description: Override animation style for this region.

itemSchema.label: Radius Override
itemSchema.description: Override border radius for this region.

itemSchema.label: Group
itemSchema.description: Group ID — regions in same group appear as continuous stroke.

fields.label: Speed (frames/region)
fields.description: Frames between each region highlight. Lower = faster. Default: 13 (~140 WPM at 30fps).

fields.label: Start Offset (frames)
fields.description: Frame offset before first highlight appears (default: 6).

fields.label: Highlight Color
fields.description: Default color for all highlights (default: #FFD700 yellow).

fields.label: Active Opacity
fields.description: Opacity of the currently-animating highlight (0-1, default: 0.45).

fields.label: Blend Mode
fields.description: CSS blend mode (default: multiply for marker effect).

fields.label: Mode
fields.description: Display mode — 'highlight' fills regions with translucent color, 'underline' draws a colored underline, 'focus' shows no marker (just dim reveals regions).

fields.label: Dim Outside Regions
fields.description: Dim areas outside the highlighted/underlined regions to focus attention. Works in both modes.

fields.label: Dim Amount
fields.description: How much to dim non-region areas (0 = no dim, 1 = fully black/white). Only applies when 'Dim Outside Regions' is enabled. Default: 0.55.

fields.label: Dim Style
fields.description: Visual style of the dim effect — 'dark' = black overlay, 'light' = white overlay, 'blur' = gaussian blur outside regions, 'grayscale' = desaturate outside, 'frost' = frosted glass (blur+white).

fields.label: Underline Thickness
fields.description: Thickness of the underline in pixels (underline mode only). Default: 4.

fields.label: Underline Color
fields.description: Color of the underline. Defaults to highlightColor if not set.

fields.label: Underline Offset
fields.description: Distance of the underline from the bottom of the region as % of image height (0 = flush with bottom). Default: 0.

scenes.name: Image Text Highlight (Legacy)
scenes.description: Marker-pen highlight over words in a screenshot. User draws highlight regions on the image and they animate with a left→right swipe reveal. Authentic hand-drawn marker feel.

fields.label: Image Source
fields.description: Image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Image Width
fields.description: Original image width in px (auto-detected from image).

fields.label: Image Height
fields.description: Original image height in px (auto-detected from image).

fields.label: Highlight Regions
fields.description: Array of highlight areas. Draw rectangles on the image or add manually. Each region highlights sequentially with a marker swipe animation.

itemSchema.label: Label
itemSchema.description: Name or text of this highlight (e.g. the word being highlighted).

itemSchema.label: X (%)
itemSchema.description: Left edge as % of image width (0-100). Set by drawing on canvas.

itemSchema.label: Y (%)
itemSchema.description: Top edge as % of image height (0-100). Set by drawing on canvas.

itemSchema.label: Width (%)
itemSchema.description: Width as % of image width. Set by drawing on canvas.

itemSchema.label: Height (%)
itemSchema.description: Height as % of image height. Set by drawing on canvas.

itemSchema.label: Start Frame
itemSchema.description: Frame when this region starts highlighting. Auto-calculated from order if not set.

fields.label: Highlight Color
fields.description: Color of the marker highlight (default: #FFD700 yellow).

fields.label: Highlight Opacity
fields.description: Opacity of the active (current) highlight (0-1, default: 0.42).

scenes.name: Enhanced Marker Highlight
scenes.description: Word-tracking marker highlight with cinematic camera that follows each word. Camera FOLLOWS each highlight like a reading eye — zooms in and pans to keep active region centered. Draw regions on the image to define what gets highlighted.

fields.label: Image Source
fields.description: Image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Image Width
fields.description: Original image width in px (auto-detected from image).

fields.label: Image Height
fields.description: Original image height in px (auto-detected from image).

fields.label: Highlight Regions
fields.description: Array of highlight areas. Draw rectangles on the image or add manually. Each region highlights sequentially with marker animation + camera tracking.

itemSchema.label: Label
itemSchema.description: Name or text of this highlight.

itemSchema.label: X (%)
itemSchema.description: Left edge as % of image width (0-100).

itemSchema.label: Y (%)
itemSchema.description: Top edge as % of image height (0-100).

itemSchema.label: Start Frame
itemSchema.description: Frame when this region starts highlighting.

itemSchema.label: Line Number
itemSchema.description: Line grouping — regions on same line get continuous stroke + line completion flash.

fields.label: Highlight Opacity
fields.description: Opacity of the active (current) highlight (0-1, default: 0.5).

fields.label: Target Screen X (%)
fields.description: Where active word sits on screen horizontally (default: 35).

fields.label: Target Screen Y (%)
fields.description: Where active word sits on screen vertically (default: 42).

fields.label: Show Word Glow
fields.description: Show glow ring on active word.

fields.label: Show Line Flash
fields.description: Flash effect when a line is completed.

scenes.name: Speaker Solo
scenes.description: Full-frame speaker with teal or warm amber tint and subtitle at bottom.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

fields.label: Warm Tint?
fields.description: Use warm amber tint instead of teal.

scenes.name: Speaker PIP
scenes.description: Speaker in a small rounded PIP inset frame. Close-up and letterbox variants.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

scenes.name: Split Speaker
scenes.description: Split layout with fire/warm/cool top zone and speaker in bottom zone.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

scenes.name: Speaker Caption
scenes.description: Speaker with caption on black bar. Studio backdrop glow with mic/laptop silhouettes.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

fields.label: Caption
fields.description: Caption text on the black bar.

scenes.name: Speaker Studio
scenes.description: Full-frame speaker in teal-orange industrial studio with caption.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

fields.label: Close-up?
fields.description: Apply slight zoom for close-up feel.

scenes.name: Speaker Dominant
scenes.description: Large speaker frame with number overlay, brand cards, and optional B-roll image card.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

scenes.name: Warm Studio
scenes.description: Speaker in warm orange/brick studio mood with gold keyword text.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

scenes.name: Speaker Neon Caption
scenes.description: Speaker with neon green keyword-highlighted caption overlay.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

fields.label: Highlight Word
fields.description: Word to highlight in neon green.

scenes.name: Speaker Cozy
scenes.description: Cozy speaker scene with optional Chrome logo and subtitle.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video source or image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render videoSrc as video.

scenes.name: B-Roll Grid PIP
scenes.description: Two-zone layout: B-roll image top ~60% + speaker PIP on 3D perspective grid bottom ~40%.

fields.label: B-Roll Image
fields.description: B-roll image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Highlight Word
fields.description: Word to highlight in neon green.

scenes.name: Multi-Cam Grid
scenes.description: 4 camera angles stacked vertically or as a 2x2 grid with optional brand label.

fields.label: Image Sources
fields.description: Array of 3-4 image filenames for different camera angles.

scenes.name: Dual Panel
scenes.description: Two stacked panels (wide + closeup) on black with Ken Burns zoom.

fields.label: Top Image
fields.description: Top panel image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Bottom Image
fields.description: Bottom panel image filename in public/ or remote URL.

scenes.name: Segmented Video
scenes.description: Plays multiple video segments back-to-back with no gaps. Each segment has its own source, start/end time. Handles cuts, removals, and multi-source clips.

fields.label: Video Segments
fields.description: Array of video segments to play sequentially.

fields.label: Title Overlay
fields.description: Optional text overlay at the bottom.

scenes.name: Light Leaks
scenes.description: Cinematic light leak overlay effect. Transparent by default — layer on top of videos/images. Uses @remotion/light-leaks for procedural film-style light bleeds with screen blend mode. 8 built-in presets (warm-film, cool-blue, golden-hour, rainbow, pink-dream, subtle-flare, neon-glow, cinematic-red). Supports custom multi-layer leaks with per-layer seed, hue shift, timing, and opacity.

fields.label: Style Preset
fields.description: Quick preset look. Auto-populates leak layers when leaks array is empty.

fields.label: Animation Mode
fields.description: 'full' = leak swells then fades. 'evolve-only' = grows and holds. 'retract-only' = starts visible and dissolves away.

fields.label: Tint Color
fields.description: Override all leak colors to this hex color (e.g. #FF6600). Leave empty to use preset colors.

fields.label: Background
fields.description: Background color. 'transparent' = overlay mode (shows content below). '#000' = solid black.

fields.label: Intensity
fields.description: Global intensity multiplier (0-1). Scales all layer opacities.

fields.label: Blend Mode
fields.description: CSS blend mode for leak layers. 'screen' = additive light (default), 'overlay' = softer, 'hard-light' = punchier.

fields.label: Background Source
fields.description: Optional video or image. Leave empty for transparent overlay.

fields.label: Is Video?
fields.description: True to render src as video, false for image.

fields.label: Light Leak Layers
fields.description: Custom leak layers. Leave empty to use the preset's layers.

itemSchema.label: Seed
itemSchema.description: Pattern seed — different numbers produce different leak shapes (try 1-20).

itemSchema.label: Hue Shift (°)
itemSchema.description: Color rotation. 0 = warm orange, 30 = gold, 200 = blue, 320 = pink.

itemSchema.label: Start Frame
itemSchema.description: Frame offset when this leak layer begins.

itemSchema.label: Duration (frames)
itemSchema.description: How long this leak layer lasts.

scenes.name: Nested Composition
scenes.description: Composes multiple scenes as positioned layers. Each layer is an independent scene rendered in a container with position, size, z-index, and animations.

fields.label: Composition Layers
fields.description: Array of scene layers to compose.

itemSchema.label: Scene Props
itemSchema.description: Props object for the scene component.

itemSchema.label: Layout
itemSchema.description: Position: { x, y, width, height (0-100%), zIndex?, borderRadius?, opacity? }.

itemSchema.label: Duration (frames)
itemSchema.description: How long this layer plays. Default: full scene.

scenes.name: Perspective Zoom
scenes.description: Universal 3D camera scene. 17 presets, full keyframe control, multi-layer parallax, 10+ effects, PIP, highlights, text reveals. The most configurable scene in the library.

fields.label: Camera Preset
fields.description: Named camera motion preset. Overridden by explicit range/keyframe props.

fields.label: Content Type
fields.description: Auto-select camera preset from content type.

fields.label: Perspective Depth (px)
fields.description: CSS perspective depth. Lower = more 3D distortion. (200-2000, default 900)

fields.label: Dynamic Origin
fields.description: Auto-shift perspective origin with pan direction.

fields.label: Zoom
fields.description: Zoom scale range. Use 2 points for [start, end] or 3 for [start, peak, end].

fields.label: Image Source
fields.description: Image filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Video Source
fields.description: Video filename in public/ or remote URL.

fields.label: Is Static File?
fields.description: True = resolve via staticFile(), false = use URL as-is (remote URL). Default: true.

fields.label: Image Width
fields.description: Source width in px for accurate pan math.

fields.label: Image Height
fields.description: Source height in px for accurate pan math.

fields.label: Content Layers
fields.description: Array of content layers with Z-depth positioning.

itemSchema.label: Z-Depth
itemSchema.description: translateZ depth in px. Positive = toward viewer.

itemSchema.label: Parallax Factor
itemSchema.description: Camera response (0-2, default 1). <1 = moves less, >1 = more.

fields.label: Text Overlay
fields.description: Main text overlay on the scene.

fields.label: Text Position
fields.description: Where to place the text overlay.

fields.label: Badge
fields.description: Small badge text above the title.

fields.label: Focus Regions
fields.description: Array of regions to auto-track with the camera.

itemSchema.label: X (%)
itemSchema.description: X position as % of content width.

itemSchema.label: Y (%)
itemSchema.description: Y position as % of content height.

fields.label: Vignette
fields.description: Dark edge overlay that intensifies with zoom.

fields.label: Depth of Field
fields.description: Auto-blur layers by Z-distance from focal plane.

fields.label: Letterbox
fields.description: Cinematic black bars top and bottom.
